privileged_info_summary: The task requires filtering a real-world shapefile (Natural Earth countries) located at /home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp to extract features where CONTINENT='South America' and POP_EST>5000000. Downloading and analyzing the public Natural Earth 1:110m Admin-0 Countries dataset yields exactly 9 qualifying countries (Brazil, Colombia, Argentina, Peru, Venezuela, Chile, Ecuador, Bolivia, Paraguay). The output must be exported to /home/ga/gvsig_exports/south_america_major.shp.
